check: One row means one entity or event
why_it_matters: Ambiguous rows create invalid targets and duplicated signals

check: Confirm target type and support
why_it_matters: The target determines the model family

check: Profile missing values by variable and segment
why_it_matters: Complete-case analysis can change the population

check: Review extreme values and data-entry errors
why_it_matters: Outliers may be true signal or invalid records

check: Compute VIF and condition number
why_it_matters: Collinearity destabilizes coefficients and standard errors

check: Plot residuals and run Breusch-Pagan style screening
why_it_matters: Nonconstant error variance can invalidate standard errors
typical_tooling: residual plots; BP test; robust SE

check: Check residual curves and partial residuals
why_it_matters: Linear terms can miss curved relationships

check: Identify repeated people stores schools counties or time periods
why_it_matters: Independent-row assumptions often fail in clustered data

check: Check residual correlation by time
why_it_matters: Time dependence affects uncertainty and forecasts

check: Count categories for classification
why_it_matters: Accuracy can be misleading under imbalance

check: Check rare factor levels
why_it_matters: Rare levels create unstable estimates and separation

check: Check perfect prediction in logistic models
why_it_matters: Maximum likelihood estimates can diverge

check: Compare count variance and mean
why_it_matters: Poisson standard errors can be too small

check: Compare observed and expected zeros
why_it_matters: Structural zeros may need two-part models

check: Document observation limits
why_it_matters: Wrong likelihood leads to biased estimates

check: Check proportional odds hazards IIA stationarity or parallel trends
why_it_matters: Specialized methods have specialized failure modes

check: Verify feature timestamps and post-outcome fields
why_it_matters: Leaked features inflate validation performance

check: Use holdout cross-validation bootstrap or time splits
why_it_matters: Performance must estimate future behavior

check: Compare predicted probabilities with observed frequencies
why_it_matters: Useful probabilities need calibration not just ranking

check: Re-run with alternate specifications
why_it_matters: Conclusions should not hinge on one fragile choice
